name: kiro-cli-agent
description: Run the kiro-cli agent (acp:kiro-cli) over ACP. kiro-cli is an Amazon-internal CLI; this provider activates only when the `kiro-cli` binary is present on the machine, and is unavailable otherwise.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: Optional model the agent defaults to. Empty uses the kiro CLI's own default.

x-meta.label: CLI Path
x-meta.help: Optional absolute path to the kiro-cli binary. Empty auto-resolves via PATH. Equivalent to the KIRO_CLI_BIN env var.
